title: Spikes to Pixels: Camera Chips for Large-scale Electrophysiology.
author_string: Lycke, Roy, Sun, Liuyang, Luan, Lan, Xie, Chong
abstract: Implanted neural probes are among the most important techniques in both fundamental and clinical neuroscience. Despite great successes and promise, neural electrodes are technically limited by their scalability. A recent study by Obaid et al. demonstrated an innovative way to greatly scale up the channel count and density of neural electrode arrays.
